title: Gundam’s Latest Crossover Has To Be Seen To Be Believed
content: Mobile Suit Gundam has had some wild crossovers in the past, with the mech franchise making its way into some unexpected avenues. For example, the original Gundam that started it all teamed up with Sanrio’s Hello Kitty for an animated special that saw mech fighting feline in outer space.
author: ComicBook

title: Rhythm Heaven Groove Game Launches on July 2
content: Nintendo announced on its Nintendo Today! app on Thursday that it will release Rhythm Heaven Groove , a new game in the Rhythm Heaven series, for Nintendo Switch on July 2. Nintendo also streamed a video of one of the rhythm minigames "Slice N Dice Kitchen:" Rhythm Heaven Megamix ( Rhythm Tengoku: The Best+ ) debuted…
author: ANN

title: 6th Be Forever Yamato: Rebel 3199 Film's 2nd Teaser Video Streamed
content: Bandai Namco Filmworks revealed a second teaser video on Friday for the sixth film in Yamato yo Towa ni: Rebel 3199 ( Be Forever Yamato : Rebel 3199), the latest project in the Space Battleship Yamato remakes. The below video previews the "Galaxy" as it departs from the moon's surface.
author: ANN

title: Anime Horror Movie Series Releases New Trailer For Final Film
content: While the anime world has its bases covered when it comes to action series and stories of romantic comedies, there is one genre that never seems to be able to hit the same heights.
author: ComicBook

title: The Villager of Level 999 Anime Casts Yūichirō Umehara
content: The staff of the television anime of Koneko Hoshitsuki 's The Villager of Level 999 ( Level 999 no Murabito ) light novel series announced on Thursday that Yūichirō Umehara will voice Menо̄, a demon who has served the Demon King for generations.
author: ANN

title: Lone Wolf & Cub Manga Gets Kabuki Play in June
content: Shidō Nakamura II (Ryuk in live-action Death Note anime and live-action franchise) will play Ogami Ittō and Nakamura's second son Natsuki Nakamura (5 years old) will play Ogami Daigorō. Film director Masanori Inoue is also working on the kabuki adaptation.
author: ANN

title: Joon-ik Lee to Direct Short-Form Live-Action Series Adaptation of Father's Home Meal Webtoon
content: Lezhin announced on Tuesday a short-form live-action adaptation of the webtoon Father's Home Meal has completed filming and entered post-production, with a release planned for the second half of 2026 on Lezhin Snack.
author: ANN

title: My Hero Academia Creator Reveals Alternate Scenes For The Series
content: The end has come and gone for My Hero Academia , though the shonen franchise still has some gas in the tank before we bid a final farewell to UA Academy. Following the conclusion of My Hero Academia: Vigilantes , the main anime series will release an epilogue episode next month titled “More.” Recently, thanks to the…
author: ComicBook

title: Mamamoo's Solar Releases Song for Webtoon-Based Live-Action Film Everyday We Are
content: Solar of Korean girl group Mamamoo has released “My Wish,” an original soundtrack song for the film Everyday We Are . "My Wish" is a ballad track centered on themes of longing and unfulfilled love, featuring Solar's vocal performance. Solar is a singer and actress best known as a member of the K-pop group Mamamoo.
author: ANN

title: 3rd Mononoke Film's 2nd Trailer Reveals Aina The End's Theme Song, More Cast
content: Twin Engine revealed the second trailer on Thursday for Gekijōban Mononoke Dai-San-Shō: Hebigami ( Mononoke the Movie: Chapter 3: Snake God ), the third installment of the Mononoke franchise's film trilogy .
author: ANN
